title: Materialized views over scoped blocks
description: There is no derived block kind. projectState() does in-memory aggregation but it is not a persisted, addressable, schema-validated block. There is no way to declare 'global issues_view.json is a derived index over per-scope finding registries' or 'open_work_view.json aggregates all non-terminal stories across features'.

evidence.reference: projectState() computes derived metrics at query time but returns in-memory only — no persistence, no addressability, no schema
only writeable blocks exist; no concept of a read-only derived block

impact: Consumers who want a flat queryable view (the current issues.json shape) cannot have it alongside scope-owned registries without manual sync. Two sources of truth or fragile regeneration.
proposed_resolution: Add a view-block kind with a definition file that names source blocks, a projection function, and refresh triggers. block-api exposes readView(name) but disallows direct writes. Refresh fires on underlying block writes. Schemas describe the view shape.
